stem: Under Notice FAA-N17, within what time must a licensed financial adviser lodge a Suspicious Activities & Incidents of Fraud Report (Form F1) with MAS?

options.A: Not later than 24 hours after discovery
options.B: Not later than 5 working days after discovery
options.C: Not later than 14 days after discovery

explanation: FAA-N17 第 4 段规定呈报须用 Form F1,并在发现后不迟于 5 个工作日内呈交。1 小时是 FSM-N23 的相关事件通知时限,14 天是 FSM-N23 的根因报告时限,均不适用此处。

stem: Notice FAA-N17 requires a licensed financial adviser to report suspicious activities or incidents of fraud to MAS when such activities or incidents are:

options.A: Of any value, regardless of significance
options.C: Material to the safety, soundness or reputation of the licensed financial adviser
options.D: Discovered by an external auditor only

explanation: FAA-N17 第 2 段将呈报触发限定为对持牌财务顾问的安全、稳健或声誉具重大影响(material)的可疑活动或欺诈事件。其他选项均非通知所设标准。

stem: Where a licensed financial adviser decides NOT to report a suspicious activity or incident to MAS under FAA-N17, it must:

options.A: Document the reasons for its decision
options.B: Obtain written approval from the client

explanation: FAA-N17 第 5 段规定,若未向 MAS 呈报某可疑活动或事件,持牌财务顾问须将其决定理由记录在案。其余选项均无通知依据。

stem: Under FAA-N17, in relation to an incident of fraud, a licensed financial adviser should ordinarily:

options.A: Only inform the client and close the file
options.B: Lodge a police report and submit a copy of the report to MAS
options.C: Refer the matter solely to its internal audit committee
options.D: Report only to the Life Insurance Association

explanation: FAA-N17 第 3 段说明就欺诈事件应报警并将报案副本呈交 MAS;若未报警,须告知 MAS 理由。该段同时确认仍须依 AML/CFT 通知向 STRO 呈交可疑交易报告。

stem: Under Notice FSM-N23, the maximum unscheduled downtime for each critical system that affects operations or customer service must not exceed a total of:

options.C: 4 hours within any period of 12 months
options.D: 24 hours within any period of 12 months

explanation: FSM-N23 第 5 段规定每个关键系统在任一 12 个月期间内的最大非计划停机时间不得超过共 4 小时。注意期间是 12 个月而非 6 个月,门槛为 4 小时。

stem: Under FSM-N23, a licensee must establish a recovery time objective (RTO) for each critical system of:
explanation: FSM-N23 第 6 段规定 RTO 不得超过 4 小时,即系统自中断点起须在该时长内恢复,并至少每 12 个月验证记录恢复测试。1 小时是相关事件的通知时限,不是 RTO。

stem: Under FSM-N23, upon discovery of a relevant incident, a licensee must notify the Authority:

options.B: As soon as possible, but not later than 1 hour
options.D: Only after completing the root cause analysis

explanation: FSM-N23 第 7 段要求发现相关事件后尽快、且不迟于 1 小时内通知 MAS。14 天是后续根因与影响分析报告的提交时限(第 8 段),而非初始通知时限。

stem: Under FSM-N23, within what time must a licensee submit a root cause and impact analysis report to the Authority following discovery of a relevant incident?

options.C: Within 14 days (or such longer period as the Authority may allow)

explanation: FSM-N23 第 8 段规定须在发现相关事件后 14 天内(或 MAS 允许的更长期间)提交根因与影响分析报告,内容含执行摘要、根因、影响与补救措施。1 小时是初始通知时限。

stem: Under Notice FAA-N19, through which channels may a financial adviser distribute Direct Purchase Insurance (DPI)?

options.A: Through any third-party introducer of its choice
options.C: Through its representative or customer service officer, or by way of an online direct channel

explanation: FAA-N19 第 8 段规定财务顾问只可通过其代表或客户服务主任(CSO)、或经在线直购渠道分销 DPI。Tier 1 人寿险公司另须至少在主要营业地点/分行(非流动分行)经代表或 CSO 分销(第 9 段)。

stem: Under FAA-N19, before a client completes an application for a DPI, the representative or customer service officer must alert the client that there is a free-look period of:
explanation: FAA-N19 第 12 段(e)(iv) 要求在客户完成申请前以清晰简明方式提醒其设有 14 天自由审阅期(free-look),并同时提醒 DPI 非储蓄/存款、提前退保可能取不回保费、部分利益不保证。

stem: Under FAA-N19, a financial adviser that is a Tier 1 life insurer must, at the minimum, distribute DPI:

options.A: Solely through an online direct channel
options.B: Through its representative or CSO at its principal place of business or branch office (not a mobile branch)
options.D: Through a mobile branch at shopping malls

explanation: FAA-N19 第 9 段规定 Tier 1 人寿保险公司至少须在其主要营业地点或分行(非流动分行)通过代表或 CSO 分销 DPI;在此基础上仍可同时使用在线直购渠道,但不可仅以在线渠道满足该最低要求。

stem: Under Notice FSM-N24, multi-factor authentication (MFA) must be implemented for which of the following?

options.A: All administrative accounts of any critical system, and all accounts on any system used to access customer information through the internet
options.D: Only accounts that never access customer information

explanation: FSM-N24 第 4.6 段要求对关键系统的所有管理员账户、以及任何用于经互联网访问客户信息的系统上的所有账户实施 MFA。其余选项与通知范围不符。

stem: Under FSM-N24, where no security patch is available to address a vulnerability in a system, a relevant entity must:

options.B: Ignore the vulnerability until a patch is released
options.C: Ensure that controls are instituted to reduce any risk posed by such vulnerability
options.D: Report the vulnerability to the Life Insurance Association

explanation: FSM-N24 第 4.2 段(b) 规定在无补丁可用时,相关实体须实施控制以降低该漏洞对系统所构成的风险。立即停用系统或忽略漏洞均非通知要求。

stem: Both FSM-N23 (Technology Risk Management) and FSM-N24 (Cyber Hygiene) state that they take effect on:
explanation: FSM-N23 第 10 段与 FSM-N24 第 5.1 段均规定通知自 2024 年 5 月 10 日生效。"即时生效"是 FAA-N17 的措辞,30 August 2019 是 FAA-N19 修订的生效日,均非这两份 FSM 通知的生效日。
sourceRef: MAS Notices FSM-N23 para 10; FSM-N24 para 5.1
